title: Enter Key to Start New Game from Menu or Game Over
content:
## Overview

Pressing **Enter** starts or restarts a game when the player is on the main menu or the game-over screen. During active gameplay, Enter has no effect.

## Behavior

| Game State | Enter Key Effect |
|---|---|
| Main menu (game not yet started) | Calls `startNewGame()` |
| Game-over screen | Calls `startNewGame()` |
| Active gameplay | No effect |

## Implementation

The logic lives in `handleKeyPress` in **`src/main.ts`**. When a keypress event fires, the handler checks whether the game has not yet started or whether the game-over state is active. If either condition is true and the key is Enter, it calls `startNewGame()`. All other game states are ignored, so the handler is a no-op for Enter during live play.

The existing **`R` key** shortcut for restarting mid-session is unaffected by this change.

## Rationale

Before this feature, keyboard-only players had no way to start or restart a game from the menu or game-over screen. Enter was chosen as the trigger because it is the conventional "confirm/proceed" key. The behavior is intentionally **contextual** — scoped to menu and game-over states only — to eliminate the risk of an accidental restart while a game is in progress.
